who: freelancers using QuickBooks for expense reporting, processing 5–15 invoices/month
offer: For freelancers using QuickBooks for expense reporting, processing 5–15 invoices/month, inconsistent expense reporting causes cash flow gaps. We consolidate expense reports and verify policy compliance instead of manual tracking and reporting in spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent expense reporting and compliance verification
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for QuickBooks freelancers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about expense reporting
DM 20-50 freelancers with a demo video
Join community forums for QuickBooks users
try_it: Let users try manual entry of expense reports on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
